name: @ilang-ai/freemoney-plugin
description: US class action settlement tracker. Queries api.ilang.ai for open claims, filters no-proof settlements, and pushes daily updates to your channel.
author: ilang-ai

tools.name: query_claims
tools.description: 查询全部开放理赔案件 / List all open class action settlements

tools.name: query_no_proof
tools.description: 查询免凭证案件 / List settlements that don't require proof of purchase

tools.name: query_new
tools.description: 查询今日新增案件 / List today's new settlements

tools.name: query_stats
tools.description: 理赔统计概览 / Settlement tracking statistics

hooks.name: daily_push
hooks.description: 每天早9点检查新案件并推送 / Daily new settlement push at 9am
